# Design Token Build Output

> Auto-generated by Style Dictionary v5. Do not edit these files directly.
> Re-run `npm run build` to regenerate.

---

## Structure

```
dist/
├── light/
│   ├── variables.css   ← CSS custom properties, :root selector
│   ├── tokens.js       ← ES6 named exports
│   └── tokens.json     ← Flat key → value map
└── dark/
    ├── variables.css   ← CSS custom properties, [data-theme="dark"] selector
    ├── tokens.js       ← ES6 named exports
    └── tokens.json     ← Flat key → value map
```

**234 tokens per mode.**

---

## Output formats

| File | Format | Naming | Example |
|---|---|---|---|
| `variables.css` | CSS custom properties | `--kebab-case` | `--color-base-primary: #0069b4;` |
| `tokens.js` | ES6 named exports | `camelCase` | `export const colorBasePrimary = '#0069b4';` |
| `tokens.json` | Flat key → value map | `kebab-case` | `"color-base-primary": "#0069b4"` |

---

## CSS selectors

- **Light** → `:root { … }`
- **Dark** → `[data-theme="dark"] { … }`

Both files can be imported together. Theme switching is a single attribute on `<html>`:

```html
<html data-theme="dark">
```

---

## Token groups

| Group | Count | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `spacing` | 35 | 0–384px, 4px base unit (Tailwind-compatible steps) |
| `border-radius` | 10 | none → full (0–9999px) |
| `color.brand.mariner` | 13 + 11 alpha | Primary brand blue |
| `color.brand.wagyu` | 11 | Brand red / destructive |
| `color.brand.angus` | 14 | Neutral grey scale |
| `color.base` | 33 | Semantic surface, text, border, ring, sidebar, charts |
| `color.alpha` | 10 | White/black overlays at 5–90% opacity |
| `color.status` | 30 | success, error, warning, caution, info, passive |
| `color.ui` | 20+ | Nav, search, breadcrumb, overlay, pricing labels |
| `color.buttons` | 30+ | default, secondary, outline, ghost, link, destructive, qty |
| `color.chips` | 20+ | category, search, attribute, catalog, color-picker |
| `color.tags`, `color.data`, etc. | ~20 | Component-level semantic tokens |

---

## Usage

### CSS

```html
<!-- Load both; dark values override light when data-theme="dark" is set -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="dist/light/variables.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="dist/dark/variables.css" />
```

```css
.button {
  background-color: var(--color-base-primary);
  padding: var(--spacing-4) var(--spacing-6);
  border-radius: var(--border-radius-rounded-md);
}
```

### JavaScript

```js
import { colorBasePrimary, spacing4, borderRadiusRoundedMd } from './dist/light/tokens.js';
```

### JSON (e.g. Storybook, style linting tools)

```js
import lightTokens from './dist/light/tokens.json' assert { type: 'json' };

const primary = lightTokens['color-base-primary']; // '#0069b4'
```

---

## Rebuild

```bash
npm run build        # Style Dictionary only
npm run pipeline     # validate tokens → build
```
